name: Priya Sharma
details: Looking for a complete living room makeover with custom lighting solutions and premium furniture pieces. Prefer neutral tones with warm wood accents.

name: Arjun Mehta
details: Newly constructed home needs complete interior design. 4 bedrooms, living, dining, and a home office. Interested in smart home integration and architectural lighting.

name: Ananya Gupta
details: Want to redesign my master bedroom with a calming, organic aesthetic. Interested in natural materials, ambient lighting, and custom storage solutions.

details: Need a functional yet luxurious home office design. Ergonomic furniture, proper task lighting, acoustic treatment, and video conferencing setup.

name: Neha Kapoor
details: Want to blend traditional Indian art and textiles with contemporary furniture. Looking for a custom dining table, lighting fixture, and storage cabinet.

name: Vikram Singh
details: Complete kitchen renovation with premium appliances, custom cabinetry, marble countertops, and integrated smart lighting.
